text: Changed ready_issues() SQL: replaced hardcoded 'issue_type IN (task, test, chore)' with '(issue_type \!= bug OR id NOT IN (SELECT fixes FROM issues WHERE fixes IS NOT NULL AND status \!= closed))'. This includes unplanned bugs in pn ready while excluding bugs that have open/in-progress fix tasks. Updated unit test ready_excludes_bugs → ready_includes_unplanned_bugs with planned-bug exclusion check. Added 3 integration tests: ready_includes_unplanned_bugs, ready_excludes_planned_bugs, ready_type_filter_excludes_bugs.

Changed close_issue() to query remaining open fix tasks before auto-closing the bug. Uses COUNT(*) WHERE fixes=bug_id AND status\!='closed' AND id\!=closing_task. Auto-close reason changed from 'fixed by <task-id>' to just 'fixed' since multiple tasks may contribute. Also fixed pre-existing clippy collapsible_if warning (logged as pn-e1ce7901). Added fixes_multi_fix_all_or_nothing integration test.
